title: phagnalon pumilum
intro: Phagnalon pumilum, also known as dwarf fleabane, is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, particularly in the treatment of wounds and skin conditions such as eczema and acne. The plant's medicinal properties are attributed to its high content of flavonoids and phenolic acids, which have been shown to have antioxidant and antimicrobial effects. In herbal preparations, Phagnalon pumilum is often used in the form of infusions, decoctions, and tinctures to promote wound healing, reduce inflammation, and soothe skin irritations.
